from flask import Flask

app = Flask(__name__)


def create_app():
    app = Flask(__name__)
    app.config["DEBUG"] = True
    app.config["SECRET_KEY"] = "dev-secret-key"
    return app


def start_server():
    app.run(debug=True, host="0.0.0.0", port=5000)


def setup_development():
    app.debug = True
    app.run(host="0.0.0.0")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    app.run(debug=True)
